scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @dragon/contracts run build && npm --workspace @dragon/upstream run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @dragon/daemon run build && npm --workspace @dragon/api run build && npm --workspace @dragon/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @dragon/daemon run typecheck && npm --workspace @dragon/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @dragon/web run typecheck
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n daemon,api,web -c blue,cyan,green "npm --workspace @dragon/daemon run dev" "npm --workspace @dragon/api run dev" "npm --workspace @dragon/web run dev"
